result.network_evidence: batchexecute POST requests to /_/BardChatUi/data/batchexecute intercepted by APF. All requests returned HTTP status 0 with XHR Error Code 6. jserror reports: 'Error code = 7, Path = /_/BardChatUi/data/batchexecute, Message = There was an error during the transport or processing of this request., HTTP status = 0, Unknown HTTP error in underlying XHR (HTTP Status: 0) (XHR Error Code: 6)'. Multiple popup/discovery card checks (MAYO, MUSTARD, TIER_HELIUM, CANVAS, EMAIL_OPT_IN, LEARNING_MODE, THINKING_GA, FLASH_20, EXPERIMENTAL_MODE, DEEP_RESEARCH, ADVANCED_EXPERIMENTAL_MODE, FLASH_20_WITH_THINKING, ADVANCED_20_MODEL, MEMORY) all failed with same transport error.
result.diagnosis: APF block confirmed via HTTP status 0 on batchexecute. Prompt was submitted (send button changed to 'stop generating'), but response stream was interrupted. Frontend stuck in limbo - not reset, not showing conversation. No warning injected. Errors: 23 console errors, 16 issues. 202 total network requests observed.

notes: 진단 빌드 후 재테스트. APF 차단 성공 (batchexecute HTTP status 0), 경고 미표시. 프론트엔드가 에러를 삼키고 초기화면 유지. C++ generator 수정 필요 — Gemini는 차단 시 경고 텍스트를 주입할 수 있는 응답 본문이 없음 (HTTP status 0으로 연결 자체가 끊김).
